issue_body_preview:
Fix cohort deletion not working
## Description

Since item key was passed as key prop, it was always undefined as React uses key as prop.

![cohortdelete](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33799331/191600839-bdde36b7-75fb-4e02-9906-9db0dd231939.gif)

## Checklist

<!--- Make sure to
test_description_zh: 在 Responsible AI 工具箱中创建多个 cohort（队列），然后尝试通过 UI 删除其中一个 cohort，观察删除操作是否正常执行。
expected_result_zh: 点击删除 cohort 后，对应的 cohort 应被成功移除，cohort 列表中不再显示被删除的项，删除操作正常生效。
